header.name: James Doyle
header.bio: I got into development through CoderDojo as a kid, studied Computer Science at Maynooth University, and now work as a Software Engineer at Ericsson. I like building for the web and messing around with side projects. When I’m not coding, I’m usually listening to music, playing games, or spending time with my partner.

projects.title: JamesReviewsMusic
projects.description: Full-stack music blog using the Spotify API for album, track, and artist data.

projects.title: SandSim
projects.description: Falling sand simulation with a number of different materials and interactions between them.

projects.title: disk.js
projects.description: A custom frontend framework, built as a learning exercise.

projects.title: Vintage Recreations
projects.description: Pure HTML and CSS recreations of random documents, fliers and cards, a fun exercise.
